systemStatus.headline: Mon Jul 13 4 AM run (email-only). Sunday Jul 12 Toast numbers have NOT landed yet -- they arrive ~6:30-7:39 AM PT. Sat Jul 11 is now FINAL and complete.
systemStatus.detail: Mon Jul 13 4 AM run. TOAST: The LOCATION-level Sat Jul 11 email arrived Jul 12 7:39 AM PT and filled the gaps flagged yesterday -- checks 261, avg check $38.34, void amount $223.70, actual discounts $224.18, actual labor cost $1,692.17. Sat Jul 11 FINAL: net $10,005.52 / gross $10,229.70 / 403 guests / 235 orders / 261 checks / labor 16.9%. vs 4-WEEK AVG (the honest comparison): net +27.0% ($7,881.13), labor 16.9% vs 19.6%. SDLW (Sat Jul 4) was the July 4th holiday at $3,829.55 -- the +161.3% swing is noise. SUNDAY JUL 12 TOAST NOT AVAILABLE at 4 AM -- arrives with today's summary email. SLING: today's (Mon Jul 13) report also not delivered yet (~7:00 AM PT); schedule shown is Sun Jul 12 carried forward. REVIEWS: 0 new in last 24h. 4 still unanswered; Patrick Williams 5* now 18 days old (OVERDUE). GOOGLE ADS: 2 routine report-ready emails (Jul 12). No disapprovals, no budget alerts. Standing flag: PMax-2 limited by budget AND all asset groups limited by policy (~1 week) -- still the single clearest fix. No live scrape this run; ads/Yelp figures carried forward from Sun Jul 12. YELP: marketing blasts only, nothing actionable. TRIPADVISOR: no ad performance report.

toast.source: LOCATION-level Daily Performance Summary (229 West Montecito Street, Sat Jul 11), received Jul 12 7:39 AM PT. Parsed from HTML on the Mon Jul 13 4 AM run. This is the FINAL, complete Sat Jul 11 record.
toast.note: SAT JUL 11 FINAL: Net $10,005.52 / Gross $10,229.70 / 403 guests / 235 orders / 261 checks / avg guest $24.83 / avg order $42.58 / avg check $38.34 / discounts $224.18 / voids $223.70 (22 items) / refunds $0 / labor $1,692.17 = 16.9% of net. vs 4-week avg: net +27.0%, labor 16.9% vs 19.6% -- a genuinely strong Saturday on the right cost line. vs SDLW (Sat Jul 4, July 4th holiday, $3,829.55): +161.3% -- ignore, depressed baseline. Lunch outsold Dinner: $5,168.70 vs $4,473.82 net. Back Room had the highest net/order at $82.39.
